auth.tagline: The digital backbone of African organizations.
auth.emailAlreadyUsed: This email address is already in use. Would you like to sign in?
auth.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Create your organization
onboarding.subtitle: You'll be able to invite collaborators once your space is ready.

dashboard.underConstructionDesc: This module will be available soon.
dashboard.emptySubtitle: Your space is ready. Start by inviting your organization's members.

empty.title: No members yet
empty.description: Start building your directory by adding your first member.

form.title: New member
form.description: Add a person to your organization's directory.

errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.emailTaken: This email address is already used in your organization.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

statusDialog.title: Change status
statusDialog.label: New status
statusDialog.error: The status could not be updated. Please try again.
statusDialog.criticalDescription: You are about to change {name} from “{from}” to “{to}”. An exit date will be recorded.

archiveDialog.title: Archive this member?
archiveDialog.description: This archives {name}. Their history (dues, attendance) will be preserved. You can restore this archive later if needed.
archiveDialog.error: The member could not be archived. Please try again.

joinRequests.approveSuccess: Request approved. This person now has access to the organization.
joinRequests.approveError: The request could not be approved. Please try again.

rejectConfirm.title: Reject this request?
rejectConfirm.description: {fullName}'s join request will be rejected and removed. This action cannot be undone.
rejectConfirm.error: The request could not be rejected. Please try again.

dialog.title: Invite a member
dialog.description: Send an email invitation to join your organization.
dialog.phoneHint: Optional at invitation, will be required at acceptance.

errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.alreadyMember: This person is already an active member of your organization.
errors.invitationPending: An invitation is already pending for this email. Resend or cancel it from the Invitations tab.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

accept.title: You're invited to join {orgName}
accept.subtitle: {inviterName} invites you to join their organization on AssoHub

join.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

sessionMismatch.description: You're signed in as {sessionEmail}, but this invitation is addressed to {invitationEmail}.

decline.title: Decline this invitation?
decline.description: Are you sure you want to decline the invitation to join {orgName}?
decline.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

footer.tagline: The digital backbone of African organizations
footer.legal: By joining AssoHub, you agree to our terms of use.

notFound.title: Invalid invitation
notFound.description: This invitation link is invalid or has expired. Contact the person who invited you to get a new link.

expired.title: Invitation expired
expired.description: This invitation expired on {date}. Ask {inviterName} to send you a new one.

accepted.title: Invitation already accepted
accepted.description: This invitation has already been accepted. If you're already a member, sign in.

declined.title: Invitation declined
declined.description: This invitation was declined. Contact {inviterName} if this was a mistake.

orgDeleted.title: Organization not found
orgDeleted.description: The organization you were invited to no longer exists.

accept.welcomeToast: Welcome to AssoHub! You've joined the organization.

errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.passwordUppercase: At least one uppercase letter required.
errors.emailTaken: An account already exists for this email.
errors.invalidInvitation: This invitation is no longer valid.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

tab.resendError: The invitation could not be resent. Please try again.

cancelConfirm.title: Cancel this invitation?
cancelConfirm.description: The invitation sent to {email} will be cancelled. You can send a new one if needed.
cancelConfirm.error: The invitation could not be cancelled. Please try again.

declinedPage.title: Invitation declined
declinedPage.description: Thanks for responding. You can close this window.

join.title: Join {orgName} on AssoHub
join.subtitle: You've been invited to join this organization via a shared link.

modeNote.auto: You'll become an active member as soon as you sign up.
modeNote.manual: Your sign-up will be reviewed by an administrator before becoming active.

notFound.title: Invalid link
notFound.description: This invite link is invalid. Contact the organization to get a new one.

orgDeleted.title: Organization not found
orgDeleted.description: The organization this link gave access to no longer exists.

revoked.title: Link revoked
revoked.description: This invite link has been revoked by the organization. Contact them to get a new one.

expired.title: Link expired
expired.description: This invite link expired on {date}. Contact the organization to get a new one.

exhausted.title: Link exhausted
exhausted.description: This invite link has reached its maximum number of uses. Contact the organization to get a new one.

join.joinError: An error occurred. Please try again.

alreadyMember.title: You're already a member of {orgName}
alreadyMember.description: You can go straight to your dashboard.

join.alreadyPending: Your request to join {orgName} is already pending review by an administrator.

errors.nameMin: The name must be at least 2 characters long.
errors.passwordUppercase: At least one uppercase letter required.
errors.invalidLink: This invite link is no longer valid.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

pendingPage.title: Request sent
pendingPage.description: Your request to join has been sent. An administrator still needs to approve it before you can access the organization.

empty.title: No active link
empty.description: Share this link on WhatsApp or by email so your members can join in one click.

card.copyError: Copy failed. Select and copy the link manually.

inviteLink.whatsappMessage:
Hi! I'm inviting you to join *{orgName}* on AssoHub — the platform that helps us manage our organization easily.

Click here to join: {link}

revokeConfirm.title: Revoke this link?
revokeConfirm.description: People who have this link will no longer be able to use it to join the organization.
revokeConfirm.error: The link could not be revoked. Please try again.

regenerateConfirm.title: Generate a new link?
regenerateConfirm.description: This will revoke your current link. People who already have it will no longer be able to use it. Do you want to continue?

dialog.title: Generate a shareable invite link
dialog.description: Configure how people who use this link will join your organization.

acceptanceModeOptions.autoDescription: People who sign up become active members right away.
acceptanceModeOptions.manualDescription: Sign-ups are put on hold, you'll need to review them.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
